message: br-bd-buup: pin fsopen null flags EPERM parity

files.patch:
@@ -579,7 +579,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-blg","title":"bd-c1x subtask: Condvar semantics spec (spurious wakeups, timeout clocks, errno rules)","description":"Background:
- Condition variables are subtle (spurious wakeups, timeout clocks, predicate loops) and require precise semantics before implementation.

Goal:
- Produce clean-room condvar semantics spec including clock handling and spurious-wakeup contract.

Deliverables:
1) wait/signal/broadcast/timedwait semantics table.
2) CLOCK_REALTIME vs CLOCK_MONOTONIC timeout conversion rules.
3) Spurious wakeup policy and required caller predicate-loop guidance.
4) Error mapping and invalid-usage handling.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Spec is implementation-ready and self-contained.
- Deferred/unsupported semantics explicitly documented.

Verification & Logging:
- Unit tests for timeout conversion helpers and semantic table consistency.
- Structured logs for spec-check tools and generated matrices.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"PurpleHawk","created_at":"2026-02-12T15:00:51.435304263Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T17:54:28.070333386Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T17:54:28.070263545Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["critique","futex","pthread","spec","testing"],"comments":[{"id":1075,"issue_id":"bd-blg","author":"PurpleHawk","text":"Completed condvar semantics spec (bd-blg). Deliverables:

1) cond_contract.md: Full transition table for init/destroy/wait/timedwait/signal/broadcast with state model (Uninitialized/Idle/Waiting/Destroyed).

2) cond.rs expanded with executable clean-room contract: CondvarContractState enum, CondvarContractOp enum, CondvarContractOutcome struct, condvar_contract_transition() const fn, CondvarAttributeContract with process_shared deferred, valid_timespec_nsec validator, futex_condvar_contention_note(), spurious_wakeup_policy().

3) 41 unit tests pass covering: all state x operation transitions, attribute support/deferral, timespec validation, lifecycle scenarios, signal/broadcast semantics, and policy documentation.

4) Conformance fixture: tests/conformance/fixtures/pthread_cond.json with 24 test cases covering all 6 operations, clock handling, null pointer checks, timeout semantics, mutex mismatch, spurious wakeup pattern, and lifecycle.

5) Spec explicitly addresses: CLOCK_REALTIME/MONOTONIC timeout conversion, spurious wakeup predicate-loop requirement, mutex association invariant (all concurrent waiters same mutex), futex requeue optimization for broadcast, and deferred features (process-shared).

Verification: cargo test -p frankenlibc-core -- pthread::cond (41 passed, 0 failed). cargo check --all-targets clean.","created_at":"2026-02-13T17:54:23Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-bpe6","title":"Performance: stdio calls 4500x slower due to membrane overhead","notes":"puts() baseline: 31ns/call, with LD_PRELOAD: 138us/call (4500x slower). Root cause: each stdio call goes through runtime_policy::decide(), healing checks, scan_c_str_len(), and observe(). This causes smoke test performance failures (>2x threshold). Need fast-path bypass for hot stdio functions or optimized policy decision path.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"SilverHarbor","created_at":"2026-04-18T00:45:22.050436442Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-18T01:18:53.265027499Z","closed_at":"2026-04-18T01:18:53.262467997Z","close_reason":"Implemented strict/default stdio write fast path; rch cargo check -p frankenlibc-abi --tests passed; focused assertions pass, with pre-existing stdio_abi_test teardown SIGSEGV tracked separately.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"comments":[{"id":1415,"issue_id":"bd-bpe6","author":"SilverHarbor","text":"Implemented strict/default fast path for hot stdio writes in stdio_abi.rs (fputc/fputs/fwrite/puts) so they bypass runtime_policy::decide/observe outside hardened mode while preserving hardened policy behavior. Formatted and diff-check clean; holding focused rch test until active peer builds clear.","created_at":"2026-04-18T01:11:59Z"},{"id":1416,"issue_id":"bd-bpe6","author":"SilverHarbor","text":"Verification: rch cargo check -p frankenlibc-abi --tests passed. Focused test strict_hot_stdio_writes_skip_runtime_policy_gate reported all assertions ok, but stdio_abi_test binary still exits SIGSEGV after teardown; existing puts_calls_without_crash and fputc_fgetc_and_ungetc_behave_consistently show the same ok-then-SIGSEGV pattern, so this is the pre-existing stdio ABI harness teardown crash rather than this fast-path assertion failing.","created_at":"2026-04-18T01:18:27Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-bpx9","title":"syscall: implement raw clone3","description":"Add a typed raw Linux clone3 syscall veneer in frankenlibc-core, plus focused syscall veneer tests covering invalid struct size and null-pointer error paths. This extends the native syscall layer for future pthread/process work under the glibc-removal epic.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-19T23:45:18.494657402Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-19T23:49:43.437157548Z","closed_at":"2026-04-19T23:49:43.435160269Z","close_reason":"Added typed raw clone3 veneer in frankenlibc-core with focused syscall veneer coverage and passed rch fmt/check/clippy/test gates.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
-{"id":"bd-buup","title":"syscall: fsopen NULL fsname with nonzero flags should preserve unprivileged EPERM host contract","description":"Host glibc returns EPERM for fsopen(NULL, 1) on this unprivileged host. Add focused ABI parity coverage so nonzero flags do not change the observed privilege-first result.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T08:13:23.773844248Z","created_by":"AmberSignal","updated_at":"2026-04-21T08:13:23.773844248Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
+{"id":"bd-buup","title":"syscall: fsopen NULL fsname with nonzero flags should preserve unprivileged EPERM host contract","description":"Host glibc returns EPERM for fsopen(NULL, 1) on this unprivileged host. Add focused ABI parity coverage so nonzero flags do not change the observed privilege-first result.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T08:13:23.773844248Z","created_by":"AmberSignal","updated_at":"2026-04-21T21:12:19.563841331Z","closed_at":"2026-04-21T21:12:19.561619438Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-bw0h","title":"resolv: add host-parity ABI probes for synchronous-only gai_* wrappers","description":"Concrete coverage gap: unistd_abi_test.rs currently hard-codes ENOSYS expectations for the getaddrinfo_a/gai_* wrapper family and does not fence the observed host-glibc degenerate semantics for null, empty, and zeroed-request inputs. Add explicit host-parity ABI tests so future stub regressions are caught immediately.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T06:14:54.947647155Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-21T16:36:16.309269609Z","closed_at":"2026-04-21T16:36:16.307083872Z","close_reason":"Added host-parity probes for synchronous gai_* wrappers and aligned gai_error zeroed-handle behavior with host libc.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-bwj","title":"Kernel: Localization fixed-point chooser (implement module)","description":"Implement runtime_math::localization controller.

Requirements:
- Pure deterministic integer scoring.
- Small constant-time evaluation.

Deliverables:

Delivered alongside design (bd-15q). EWMA-smoothed 5-signal input, 5-arm Euler-weighted scoring, O(1) integer-only. Clippy clean.","created_at":"2026-02-10T17:40:17Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-by8c","title":"bd-3bg subtask: Runtime iconv dispatch integration with explicit fallback/error policy","description":"Background:
- Runtime codec selection must remain deterministic and safe even with partial codec coverage.

Goal:
- Integrate generated codec tables into runtime iconv path with explicit fallback and error policy.

Deliverables:
1) Runtime lookup/dispatch integration.
2) Fallback behavior for unsupported codecs.
3) Mode-aware safety handling and telemetry.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Supported conversions succeed deterministically.
- Unsupported conversions fail according to explicit contract.

Verification & Logging:
- Unit tests for supported/unsupported conversion paths.
- Structured logs with trace_id, codec_pair, dispatch_path, outcome, errno.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria
Implementation must preserve all existing functionality and claims while adding deterministic verification coverage.

### Mandatory Verification Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for all touched logic: positive, negative, adversarial, and regression.
- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in strict and hardened mode where relevant.
- Structured logs are mandatory for unit/e2e runs with fields: `trace_id`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `decision_path`, `healing_action`, `errno`, `latency_ns`, `artifact_refs`.
- Closure evidence must include exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist logs, diffs, and reports with deterministic naming and retention for replay/triage.
- Tooling contract: deterministic orchestration/traceability uses `/dp/asupersync`, and deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI evidence uses `/dp/frankentui`.","notes":"### Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist
- Test command set is documented in bead notes before closure (unit + e2e + perf where applicable).
- Expected output and pass/fail thresholds are documented per command.
- Failure triage snippets are documented (top failure classes + where to inspect artifacts).
- Evidence index entry links logs, parity diffs, and benchmark/proof artifacts.
- Overload behavior logging is required when applicable: pressure signal, degradation mode, selected policy, guard decision, rollback trigger.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"ScarletBasin","created_at":"2026-02-12T15:01:54.486299908Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-13T23:53:30.710296662Z","closed_at":"2026-04-13T23:53:30.710097235Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["critique","iconv","implementation","testing","verification"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-by8c","depends_on_id":"bd-13ya","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:32Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-by8c","depends_on_id":"bd-7cba","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:32Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
